ReVanced F-Droid

Unofficial F-Droid simple-binary repository of ReVanced-patched applications, built by revancedbot on GitHub Actions.

Currently it serves 13 apps. To add it to your F-Droid app, scan the QR code (click it to enlarge) or use this link:

https://fdroid-revanced.github.io/repo

If you would like to manually verify the fingerprint (SHA-256) of the repository signing key, here it is:
99 0A A5 15 64 4A 3F 15 28 C1 22 F2 CE 9C EB 19 F4 04 91 25 32 39 45 79 EB ED AE A3 2C 99 CD E9
